sections.description: Internal Kingdom tool for managing Sermons, Events, and Calendar views (with recurrence).
sections.changelog:
• Fixed yearly recurrence so annual events repeat on the correct calendar date by default.
  • Added yearly recurrence pattern options for same date every year or nth weekday of a selected month.
  • Added support for yearly patterns such as 3rd Sunday of March.
  • Updated yearly recurrence settings in the event editor.
  • Updated yearly recurrence save logic and recurrence summary behavior.
  • Improved recurring event generation for yearly nth weekday patterns.
